perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A band is performing on an outdoor stage during daytime; members play electric guitar and bass in front of a large LED screen with colorful cartoon crab illustrations. (2) The scene shifts to a man in a white t-shirt with colorful patterns speaking into a microphone on stage, gesturing to a crowd. (3) A close-up series shows band members being interviewed off-stage; they make funny faces and gestures while talking about 'cheats'. (4) The video concludes with high-energy concert footage at night with dramatic stage lighting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat rock music with high-tempo drums and electric guitar starts as background audio while crowd chatter is audible. (2) A clear male voice speaks into a microphone with an excited, promotional tone, followed by snippets of a band's song. (3) The audio shifts to casual, dry conversational voices of multiple men laughing and joking in an outdoor environment with wind noise. (4) Loud, high-energy singing and instruments resume, ending with a final chord and cheering.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 七月半 (July Half) - Decorative branding text. (2) 活動站台 (Activity platform) - Functional text describing the event stage. (3) 自己打歌 (Promoting own song) - Decorative/Hook text. (4) 路跑變簽唱會 (Road run becomes signing event) - Narrative hook. (5) 七月半今年還需要貼小抄嗎？ (Does July Half still need cheats this year?) - Functional question for the interview. (6) 今晚一起High翻台中!!! (Let's get high together in Taichung tonight!!!) - High-energy hook text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Performance Teaser -> Event Interaction -> Humorous Interview -> Final Performance Hook

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 5 band members on stage, multiple staff and audience members visible in the background and interview shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult males dressed in casual street wear, hoodies, and event-themed t-shirts; some holding musical instruments.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large outdoor stage with professional lighting rigs, a huge LED screen displaying vibrant cartoons, and backstage areas with tents and technical equipment.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight mixed with high-intensity stage LED lights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Snippets -> Humorous Interaction -> Performance Peak
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional vlog for the band 'Seven Moon Half', documenting their appearance at a public event. It combines high-energy performance clips with lighthearted, humorous interview segments to showcase the band members' personalities and build excitement for their live shows in Taichung.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The band is appearing at a corporate-sponsored road run event (Momo, Dazhou Group logos in background).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Self-deprecating humor about using cheat sheets and playing skill.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a youthful demographic familiar with Taiwanese internet celebrities and the specific 'Seven Moon Half' band identity.
